components.a11yStatus: partial: exposes aria-busy but defaults to type=button not enforced
depends on parent label wiring; no described-by slots
same as Input; relies on caller
Radix handles focus but trigger lacks aria-describedby
Radix primitive but no label slot
Relies on Radix focus trap; title/description components optional
Radix dialog variant; aria labels delegated
Key bindings via Radix; trigger labeling manual
Data table uses TanStack without caption or scope
Div wrappers only; requires role per context
Custom stack lacks aria-live while Radix stack exists

risks.summary: CSS variables, tailwind config, and tokens.ts define separate palettes and spacing scales with no synchronization.
risks.evidence: Globals define --primary/--radius, tailwind extends colors, and src/lib/design-system/tokens.ts ships conflicting hex palette.
risks.recommendation: Adopt a single token map (see ui_token_map_proposal.json) and drive Tailwind + TS exports from it before introducing shadcn/ui.

risks.summary: Fallback pages embed hard-coded #007AFF/#666666 colors instead of tokens, so theme or brand swaps will miss them.
risks.evidence: Inline hex values at src/app/not-found.tsx:19 and src/app/error.tsx:34.
risks.recommendation: Replace literals with semantic classes (bg-primary, text-muted-foreground) once the token merge lands.

risks.summary: Two standalone CSS files for hero/code blocks carry >20 !important rules but are never imported by the app, indicating dead or at-risk styles.
risks.evidence: src/styles/hero-code-block.css and src/styles/code-block.css are only referenced in docs, not in src/app/*.
risks.recommendation: Convert the needed pieces into Tailwind utilities or delete to avoid confusion before migration.

risks.summary: Five marketing/dashboard routes exceed 330–520 lines, interleaving layout logic, Radix primitives, and mock data, making staged migration risky.
risks.evidence: wc -l shows src/app/whats-included/page.tsx (521 lines), features/page.tsx (453), components/page.tsx (447), (dashboard)/dashboard/page.tsx (433), templates/analytics-dashboard/page.tsx (372).
risks.recommendation: Split each into smaller section components (hero, metrics, table, etc.) before swapping primitives so each PR stays JAR-sized.

risks.summary: Two toast systems (Radix + custom) and duplicate cn utilities coexist, so consumers import inconsistent APIs.
risks.evidence: Radix toast in src/components/ui/toast.tsx + toasters, while src/components/Toast.tsx and src/lib/utils.ts vs src/lib/design-system/utils.ts duplicate helpers.
risks.recommendation: Pick the shadcn/toast implementation, delete the custom container, and expose a single cn helper inside /lib.

risks.summary: Charts, progress bars, and hero media rely on inline style props and uncontrolled motion with no prefers-reduced-motion guard.
risks.evidence: Inline width/height styles at dashboard/page.tsx:286, templates/analytics-dashboard/page.tsx:156, hero-video.tsx:50, tech-stack-section.tsx:38.
risks.recommendation: Move sizing into Tailwind (utility classes or CSS variables) and wrap Framer Motion usage with useReducedMotion before migrating to shadcn/ui.

scope: Author a single tokens.ts/json source of truth for color/spacing/radius
Generate tailwind.config.ts theme extensions from that source
Map CSS custom properties and document semantic names
acceptanceCriteria: globals.css reads from CSS variables emitted by the shared token map
No hard-coded hex values outside token definition files
Storybook/docs (if any) point to the same token ids

scope: Remove duplicate cn utilities and custom Toast
Ensure Radix wrappers expose aria props and forward refs
acceptanceCriteria: All primitives live under src/components/ui and match shadcn/ui signatures
Only one toast system remains and it uses sonner/Radix consistently
ESLint/TS config enforces single cn export

scope: Break landing/home/variations pages into feature sections
Replace inline styles, hex colors, and motion defaults with tokenized Tailwind classes
Add prefers-reduced-motion handling to Framer Motion blocks
acceptanceCriteria: Each marketing route composes exported section components
Motion respects reduced-motion and tokens supply all palette references

scope: Refactor dashboard/admin/templates pages into smaller feature modules
Move chart/progress math into hooks that emit Tailwind-friendly data attributes
Introduce data-table adapters to wrap TanStack with shadcn table primitives
acceptanceCriteria: Progress/metric visuals rely on CSS classes rather than inline styles
Tables expose captions, aria-sort, and consistent utility imports
